chunks.text: ESG – Electronic Support Group | EECS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation The Electronics Support Group manages instructional labs in Cory hall, and classroom AV systems in Cory Hall, Soda Hall, and Jacobs Hall. Instructional Lab support:

Hall, and Jacobs Hall. Instructional Lab support: General lab access :- Labs are located inside dedicated areas and accessible via card key. Card key access are granted to all students enrolled in the labs at the beginning of the semester. For late
